# `polars math bitwise-and` for [dataframe](/commands/categories/dataframe.md)

<div class='command-title'>Perform an aggregation of bitwise ANDs over a column expression.</div>

## Signature

```> polars math bitwise-and {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input             | output            |
| ----------------- | ----------------- |
| polars_expression | polars_expression |
| polars_selector   | polars_expression |
## Examples

Perform an aggregation of bitwise ANDs
```nu
> [[n]; [-1] [-0] [-1]] |
    polars into-df |
    polars select (polars col n | polars math bitwise-and | polars as n) |
    polars collect
╭───┬───╮
│ # │ n │
├───┼───┤
│ 0 │ 0 │
╰───┴───╯

```
